year. 

SHORT NAME: MFP_QLFYD_INSTN_CD 

LONG NAME: MFP_QLFYD_INSTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Money Follows the Person 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 00 = Default- No MFP Participation 
01 = Nursing Facility 
02 = ICF/IID (Intermediate Care Facilities for individuals with Intellectual Disabilities) 
03 = IMD (Institution for Mental Diseases) 
04 = Hospital 
05 = Other 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: —
